data.title: Nano Nuclear rises after completing first full tests for proprietary pump technology
data.description:
** Shares of nuclear technology company Nano Nuclear Energy rise 4.5% to $33.2 premarket

** Company says it completed first full tests of its new annular linear induction pump (ALIP) at 350°C at its New York demo site

** The tests aimed to ensure ALIP can last in places where maintenance is not possible like space, undersea, or nuclear environments

** "We continue to advance our patent-pending ALIP technology toward commercialization," says Chairman Jay Yu

** Up to last close, shares up 27.8% YTD

data.title: Just How Pricey is Nvidia Stock? — WSJ
data.description:
By WSJ Staff

Not as expensive as it used to be, based on one widely watched valuation measure-the price-earnings ratio. While Nvidia's stock price has soared, its earnings power has risen even quicker, pushing down the PE ratio.

  • As of Tuesday's close, Nvidia's stock traded at about 28.5 times expected earnings over the next 12 months, according to FactSet.
  • That's not far off the 27.7 times at which the Nasdaq composite trades.
  • Over the past five years, Nvidia's valuation was on average more than 40% higher than the index's.

This item is part of a Wall Street Journal live coverage event. The full stream can be found by searching P/WSJL (WSJ Live Coverage).

data.title: Euro Unlikely to Rise Considerably on German Fiscal Stimulus — Market Talk
data.description: Germany's fiscal expansion plans could boost growth and inflation next year but this is unlikely to drive significant euro gains, HSBC Global Investment Research strategists say in a note. "With expectations already running high over what [German Chancellor Friedrich] Merz's government will deliver next year, the risk of under-delivering exists." The hype surrounding the fiscal plans for the euro has also passed, leaving the bigger drivers to be the dollar and Federal Reserve's next moves, they say. HSBC expects the euro to rise to $1.20 this quarter from $1.1587 currently, before falling to $1.18 by the second quarter of 2026 as it expects the Fed to cut rates in December but deliver no more cuts in 2026. (renae.dyer@wsj.com)

data.title: Brazil raw steel output falls 2.7 % in October, AÇO BRASIL says
data.description: SAO PAULO, 19 Nov (Reuters) – Raw steel output in Brazil fell 2.7 % to 2.988 million tonnes in October in an annual basis, Aco Brasil, the group that represents mills, said on Wednesday. Sales in the local market fell 6.5 % to 1.814 million tonnes in the October from the same period a year earlier,the institute, known as Aço Brasil, said in a report.

data.title: Redwire jumps on $44 million contract for DARPA Otter mission
data.description:
** Shares of space infrastructure firm Redwire jump 9.2% to $5.93 premarket

** RDW says it has been awarded $44 mln phase 2 contract to advance the Defense Department's DARPA Otter Very Low Earth Orbit (VLEO)

** The Phase 2 contract provides funding to complete manufacturing and deliver spacecraft to launch for mission

** "With Otter and our SabreSat platform, we are delivering higher-performance missions at lower altitudes," said Tom Campbell, President of Space Missions at Redwire

** Up to last close, RDW had fallen 67% this year

data.title: Chordate Medical Holding AB (publ) receives observation status
data.description:
Nasdaq Stockholm ABFirst North Growth Market - Equities

Chordate Medical Holding AB (publ) receives observation status

Yesterday, November 18, 2025, Chordate Medical Holding AB (publ) (the“Company”) disclosed a notice convening an extraordinary general meeting of theCompany's shareholders, with a proposal for voluntary liquidation of theCompany and that the Company's shares shall be delisted from Nasdaq First NorthGrowth Market.

The rules of First North Growth Market state that a listed company can be givenobservation status if the issuer has disclosed its intention to enter intoliquidation or delist its financial instruments from Nasdaq First North GrowthMarket.

With reference to the above, Nasdaq Stockholm AB decides that the shares (CMH,ISIN code SE0022726139, order book ID 247854) and the preference shares (CMHPREF, ISIN code SE0023848619, order book ID 391561) in Chordate Medical HoldingAB (publ) shall be given observation status.

For further information about this exchange notice please contact Enforcement &Investigations, telephone +46 8 405 70 50.https://view.news.eu.nasdaq.com/view?id=b0abab2238ee3fe2b6f21df03ebf7651b&lang=en&src=omxlink
